3269080.name: Burntime Remastered
3269080.description:
Survive and conquer the post-apocalyptic world of Burntime.

Features

  • Original Gameplay: Play through the original game from 1993 with some enhancements.

  • Survival: Find food, parts to build traps and people to help you.

  • Conquer: Establish camps around all major cities to win the game.

  • Remastered Visuals: Enjoy enhanced graphics and wide screen support while still being true to its 90s pixel art.

  • Remaster Toggles: Prefer the original graphics, or the AMIGA sound track? Change in the options.

About the Development

This remaster was done by a super fan of the original game.
It was only possible thanks to the ok by the creators, and the many issue feedback by fellow fans.

It is fully reprogrammed from scratch using the original graphics and sounds.

Issue reports and smaller improvement ideas are appreciated on GitHub.
